美股與國際市場 ·

三星韓國廠勞資僵持：18天總罷工在即，政府高调介入Samsung Korea Faces 18-Day Strike Threat as Seoul Steps In

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6461061

  • 資方公開致歉並提無條件對話，工會仍計畫5月下旬起進行為期18天的總罷工。
  • 韓國中央勞動委員會兩度調解破局，癥結含績效獎金比例與制度透明度等要求。
  • 工會稱約4.1萬名成員有意參與罷工，若對峙升溫，實際人數可能突破5萬。
  • 分析指出長時間停工恐釀鉅額營收與重啟成本，並削弱客戶信任、波及半導體供應鏈。
  • 韓國產業主管公開強調須阻止罷工，並暗示政府恐啟動緊急調解機制。

三星電子與工會因績效獎金與談判條件僵持；資方低姿態道歉並喊對話，工會仍堅持先打完18天罷工再談。首爾官員公開喊停並預告緊急調解，市場關注對記憶體與代工供應鏈的連鎖影響。

  • Samsung apologized and proposed unconditional talks, but the union still plans an 18-day strike starting in late May.
  • Two rounds of mediation failed over disputes such as performance bonus ratios and demands for clearer rules.
  • Union leaders say roughly 41,000 members may walk out, with turnout possibly exceeding 50,000 if tensions worsen.
  • Analysts warn lengthy stoppages could cause massive financial losses and shake trust across semiconductor supply chains.
  • South Korea’s industry minister vowed to block the strike and hinted emergency government mediation may follow.

Bonus disputes pushed Samsung and its union into a deadlock; Seoul vows to stop an 18-day strike plan amid chip supply worries.
